column2: 4 MB flash — UNIFIED factory + A/B OTA (shared with the factory/recovery

column1: # project: one bootloader + one partition table on the device).
# `factory` (0xA0000 / 640 KB) holds the SMALL recovery image (intentionally minimized
# to fit). The MAIN app (~955 KB) does NOT fit factory and lives in ota_0/ota_1
# (1.56 MB). PlatformIO would normally size/flash the main app against `factory` and
# fail — so the main-app build sets `board_build.app_partition_name = ota_0` (size
# check vs ota_0) + a post-script points the flash offset at ota_0. Booting ota_0 also
# needs otadata pointed there: see scripts/flash-main-app.sh (esptool + otatool).
# `encrypted` on coredump + esp_secure_cert: no-op while Flash Encryption is off; when
# FE is enabled (CONFIG_SECURE_FLASH_ENC_ENABLED) those data partitions get encrypted
# at rest. App/bootloader/otadata are auto-encrypted; nvs/storage (NVS) can't use the
